title: Incident Brief
summary: Error traffic dropped after one provider route was removed from rotation. The service is stable again.

content.title: Trigger
content.text: A provider returned repeated model-not-found responses during peak traffic.

content.title: Impact
content.text: Only requests on one route were affected; fallback traffic continued normally.

content.title: Action
content.text: Removed the unhealthy provider route and kept the fallback route enabled.

content.title: Status
content.text: No new alerts are firing. Keep watching error rate and latency for one hour.
